name: projects
context: Create, query, and manage Linear projects for cross-team initiatives and milestone tracking
info: Projects in Linear group related issues across teams into larger initiatives with milestones, status updates, and progress tracking. Unlike issues which belong to a single team, projects can span multiple teams. Projects have a status (planned, started, paused, completed, cancelled), lead, target date, and associated issues. The GraphQL API provides mutations for creating and updating projects, adding/removing issues, and posting project updates. Agents use this skill to set up new initiatives, track cross-team progress, and report project status. See [[linear/issues]] for the issues that belong to projects and [[linear/teams]] for team context.
triggers: add issues to a linear project

sections.title: Querying projects
sections.body: List projects with `projects(filter, first, orderBy)`. Filter by `state` (planned, started, paused, completed, cancelled), `lead`, or `teams`. Each project includes `name`, `description`, `state`, `progress` (0-1), `targetDate`, `startDate`, `lead`, `teams`, and `issues`. Paginate with cursor-based pagination.

sections.title: Creating projects
sections.body: Use `projectCreate(input)` mutation with `name` (required) and optional `description`, `teamIds`, `leadId`, `targetDate`, `startDate`, `state`. Returns `{ success, project { id, name, url } }`. Projects start in `planned` state by default.

sections.title: Project updates
sections.body: Post status updates with `projectUpdateCreate(input: { projectId, body, health })`. Health values: `onTrack`, `atRisk`, `offTrack`. Updates support markdown. They appear in the project's activity feed and notify subscribers. Use updates for weekly standup reports and milestone announcements.

sections.title: Progress tracking
sections.body: The `progress` field is automatically calculated as completed issues / total issues (0.0 to 1.0). Query project issues and their states for custom metrics. Milestone tracking uses `targetDate` — compare with current progress to determine if the project is on track.

links.context: Add existing issues to a project
Authentication required for all project operations
Webhook events fire on project changes

related.note: Issues are the work items within projects

scripts.name: Manage Linear Projects
scripts.description: List, create, and update Linear projects

depends.reason: Authentication required for all project API calls
